zh.lifeSummary: 當Comtors de La Barthe於1175年出生在法國奧其坦尼豪-加洛時，她的父親Arnaud-Guilhem I de la Barthe51歲，母親Navarre35歲。她去世於1234年在法國享年59歲。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.
Indian: variant of   Dey  .

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: La
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Vietnamese Hung, Cuong, Anh, Thanh, Ha, Hoang, Tuan, Chau, Hao, Hien, Hoa, Hue, Nam, Phong, Sinh, Tuong, Min, Tam, Tanh, Thai, Tham, Tinh, Yeong.  Chinese Hong, Hang, Sang, Tong, Chan, Chi, Hwa Ja, Hyung, Kam, Ki Bong, Kin, Man.
Vietnamese: from the Chinese surname 羅, see   Luo   1.
Vietnamese (Lã): from the Chinese surname 呂, see Lu 6 and 3 below.

variants.name: Luo
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Wei, Jian, Yi, Ping, Yong, Zhen, Feng, Hong, Ming, Jin, Bin, Chen, Hai, Lan, Min, Huan, Hung, Shen, Tian.
Chinese:

Mandarin form of the surname 羅, meaning ‘net for catching birds’ or ‘to collect’ in Chinese: (i) from Luo (羅), the name of an ancient state (located in present-day Hubei province). After it was annexed by the state of Chu during the early Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ), people from the state migrated southwards and adopted Luo (羅) as their surname. (ii) from the Po Duo Luo (破多羅) and Chi Luo (叱羅) families from the Xianbei ethnic group in northern China, who changed their original surnames to 羅 during the Northern Wei dynasty (386–534  AD ). (iii) from the personal name Hu Se Luo (斛瑟羅), leader of an ancient Turkic tribe who are believed to have migrated to China during the Tang dynasty (618–907  AD ). His descendants inherited his name Hu Se Luo (斛瑟羅) as their surname and shortened it to 羅 during the Northern Wei dynasty (386–534  AD ). (iv) from the name of one of the seven families from the Bandun Man, an ethnic group residing in ancient southwestern China (located mainly in present-day Sichuan province).

nameMeanings.name: Barthe
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Alphonse, Ghyslaine, Raymonde.

French: topographic name for someone who lived on a piece of land overgrown with bushes or scrub, Occitan barta (a word probably of Gaulish origin), or a habitational name from (La) Barthe, the name of several places in the south of France.
German: metonymic occupational name for someone who made (battle)axes, from Middle High German barte, Middle Low German barde ‘axe’.

variants.name: Bart
meanings: German: variant of Barth 1 ‘beard’. This name, which can not be always distinguished from 3 below, is also found in Poland, Czechia, Slovakia, and Slovenia, sometimes as a German translation of Slavic surnames meaning ‘beard’ or ‘bearded man’, e.g. Polish Broda , Czech and Slovak Bradáč, Slovenian Bradač (see Bradac ).
North German: from the personal name Bart, a short form of ancient Germanic names based on the element bert ‘bright, brilliant’, as for example Barthold .

Dutch, German, English, French, Polish, Sorbian, and Slovak; Czech (Bárt): from the personal name Bart (Czech Bárt), a vernacular short form of local variants of Latin Bartholomaeus (see Bartholomew ). This may also be the origin of a homonymous Slovenian surname (see 1 above).

nameMeanings.name: Comtors
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Lucien, Marcel, Andre, Normand, Pierre, Camil, Fernand, Fernard, Gisele, Jean-Guy, Laurier, Michel.
French: habitational name for someone from Franche-Comté, a province of eastern France. Compare   Contois  .

variants.name: Contois
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Armand, Fernand, Raoul, Raynald.
French: variant of   Comtois   and, in North America, (also) an altered form of this.

en.lifeSummary: When Comtors de La Barthe was born in 1175, in Haute-Garonne, Occitanie, France, her father, Arnaud-Guilhem I de la Barthe, was 51 and her mother, Navarre, was 35. She died in 1234, in France, at the age of 59.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Comtors de La Barthe est née en 1175, à Haute-Garonne, Occitanie, France, son père, Arnaud-Guilhem I de la Barthe, avait 51 ans et sa mère, Navarre, avait 35 ans. Elle est décédée en 1234, à France, à l’âge de 59 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Comtors de La Barthe 1175 in Haute-Garonne, Occitanie, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Arnaud-Guilhem I de la Barthe 51 und ihre Mutter Navarre 35. Sie starb 1234 im Alter von 59 Jahren in Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Comtors de La Barthe è nata il nel 1175 nel Haute-Garonne, Occitanie, Francia, sua padre, Arnaud-Guilhem I de la Barthe, aveva 51 anni e sua madre, Navarre, aveva 35 anni. Morì nel 1234, nel Francia, all'età di 59 anni.

ko.lifeSummary: Comtors de La Barthe(이)가 1175년 프랑스 옥시탠이 하테-가니에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Arnaud-Guilhem I de la Barthe(은)는 51세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Navarre(은)는 35세였다. 그녀는 1234년 프랑스에서 59세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Comtors de La Barthe nasceu em 1175, em Haute-Garonne, Occitanie, França, seu pai, Arnaud-Guilhem I de la Barthe, tinha 51 anos e sua mãe, Navarre, tinha 35 anos. Ela faleceu em 1234, em França, com 59 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Comtors de La Barthe родилась в 1175 г. в местности хауте-гаронн, окситани, Франция, её отцу по имени Arnaud-Guilhem I de la Barthe было 51 год, а матери, которую звали Navarre, 35. Она умерла в 1234 г. в местности Франция в возрасте 59 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Comtors de La Barthe nació en 1175, en Haute-Garonne, Occitanie, Francia, su papá, Arnaud-Guilhem I de la Barthe, tenía 51 años y su mamá, Navarre, tenía 35 años. Murió en 1234, en Francia, a la edad de 59 años.
